cast.name: Lj Smith
cast.character: Master Chief Petty Officer of the Navy

plot outline: When the White House (Secret Service Code: "Olympus") is captured by a terrorist mastermind and the President is kidnapped, former Presidential Secret Service Agent Mike Banning finds himself trapped within the building. As our national security team scrambles to respond, they are forced to rely on Banning's inside knowledge to help retake the White House, save the President and avert an even bigger disaster.
title: Olympus Has Fallen
akas: End of White House (Japan, English title)
La Chute de la Maison Blanche (France)
Olympus Has Fallen - Die Welt in Gefahr (Germany)

distributors.name: Walt Disney Studios Motion Pictures Germany
